title: I would love to see an easier way to switch between workspaces without click dropdown
excerpt: It would be nice to have the ability to switch workspaces without clicking the dropdown.  Similar to Slack where the spaces are displayed on the right hand side as icons you can click between.

posts.author: adamh (Adam Herrmann)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to have the ability to switch workspaces without clicking the dropdown. Similar to Slack where the spaces are displayed on the right hand side as icons you can click between.
